      Creates a drive encoder based on the configured encoder type.
      static SwerveEncoder SwerveEncoderFactory.createSteeringEncoder(OctoQuadFWv3 octoQuad, SRSHub srsHub, int octoQuadPort, int analogPin, double offsetRadians)
      Creates a steering encoder with default counts per revolution (8192).
